category.name: zoo.tooltip
category.item: For an overview of your water tower capacity and storage building, click here.
You have already reached the limit.

You still need %xp points
to reach the next level.
Left-click to copy user data to the clipboard
Click for more information.
Here you can see how many zoogros you have.
Here you can see how many zoodollars you have.
Need help? The tutorial will show you how.
Logout
Here you will find the settings for your zoo.

Are you expecting real zoo sounds?
Then listen up!
Sometimes you need a closer look. Zoom in on each enclosure!
Click here to show or hide the top bar!
Click here to show or hide the bottom bar!

Ouch, that's close! That could be dangerous!
You better back up a bit so some animal doesn't bite you!
Perfect overview! Here you can see the entire zoo in the palm of your hand!
Every zoo needs advertising. Take a photo here to attract visitors.
In the store you will find everything you need to make your zoo famous and attract visitors.

Buy animals for your zoo here.
But first you need to build an enclosure so the animal has a place to live.
Important: Decide whether you want to buy a male or female.
The more stars, the more exclusive and exotic the animal is.
Attractiveness points

You need %neededExpansion% zoo expansion to do this.
You currently only have %userExpansion% zoo expansion.
You must expand your zoo to purchase this item.

You already own this item. Please look in your inventory.
Click here to open it.
Different animals need different environments. Choose an enclosure here for your animal to live in. Simply buy it and place it in the zoo.

These buildings not only look great,
but they also fill the coffers.
Here you will find everything that zoo visitors desire.

A real zoo must also have the right atmosphere. Various decorative items
will certainly increase the attractiveness of your zoo.

Do you still have enough food? Check here! If you're running low on food,
click "Buy" and quickly replenish your supplies.

Zoo directors have their hands full!
These helpers will take over many of your responsibilities!
Connect your enclosures and attractions with walkways so visitors can get everywhere.
Unfortunately, you cannot use this item in this part of the zoo.
Move or flip your enclosures and buildings, or sell them.
Move
You still need (number: %amount%) eggs
You need %amount% (number: %collectable%)
Buy (number: %amount%) Easter eggs here.
Buy %amount% random items here.
Reverse
Sell
Game mode
To inventory
Everything in inventory

Are you short on money?
Then go to the bank!

The zoo director has a lot of work to do.
Find your tasks here!
This feature is not currently active.
Hire helpers for your zoo here.
Here you will find your zoo-mail: Send messages to your friends, use bonus codes and collect trophies.
In your zoo warehouse you will find items that you have collected during the game.
Click here to expand or collapse the zoom meter.

You can see how attractive your zoo is on the zoom meter on the left.
Click here to get detailed information
on the attractiveness of your zoo and tips for improving it.

Your zoo's attraction is currently %attraction%.
Your zoo currently earns approximately %moneyMainBuilding% zoogros per hour.

Your zoo's attraction is currently %attraction%.
Click here to see your zoogros income.

You are currently earning %storemoney% zoogros per hour with the buildings in your zoo.
Click here to see the number of visitors.

%visitors% visitors per hour.
Click here to see the attractiveness of your zoo.
Missing connection to the road!
If you employ 6 assistants (excluding Dr. Lynn), the co-director will automatically be active. Click on him and the 6 assistants will immediately get to work.
Honza, feeding assistant
Super food: Click here and Honza will feed the animals with super food and automatically buy it for you!
The best food: Click here and Honza will feed the animals the best food and automatically buy it for you!
Pavel, power supply assistant
Slavek, the cleaner
Soňa, breeder
Jirka, the garbage collector
Cashier, financial assistant
Dr. Lynn, veterinarian
Administer Super Medicine: Click here and Dr. Lynn will cure your animals with Super Medicine and also automatically purchase it when it runs out!
Jindra, the fish feeder
Matej, water expert
Franta, pool technician
Janička, marine mammal trainer

Send messages to your friends
or read messages they've sent you.

Do you have a bonus code?
Then choose it here!
Open news

Don't feel like playing alone?
Invite your friends.
Download toolbar
Possible animal husbandry
Animal breeding ended
Buy another try!
This will take you to the hidden zoo.
This is how you get to the zoo.
This will take you to the zoo map.
This way to the main zoo
Easter helper Soňa
30% BZ booster
100% BZ booster
30% paw booster
100% paw booster
30% zoocoin booster
100% zoocoin booster
POI package
Paw pack
Open the bonus menu
Close menu with bonus
Breeding Upgrade

category.name: zoo.tooltip.mail
category.item: Send a message to this player
Reply
Delete message
Add player to directory
Remove player from directory

category.name: zoo.tooltip.news
category.item: You can now collect %waitingPP% zoo coins at your zoo.

During your absence,
%visitorsAbsence% visitors visited the zoo.

Currently,
%CurrentVisitorsPerHour% visitors visit your zoo every hour.

category.name: zoo.tooltip.achievements
category.item: Master Pet
Your animals need a lot of love, so you should give them all a good cuddle. Click on the enclosure and then on the teddy bear symbol.
Animal friend:
A true animal lover loves all animals and keeps them in a group so they are not alone.
Breeding experts:
Only then, when your animals feel completely comfortable, will they have young.
Merchant/tradesperson:
To keep your animals from starving, you need income from your buildings. Quickly, click to collect it as soon as the zoopenny sign appears!
Steak Master:
Your predators will appreciate a good piece of meat to chew on. Feed them!
The order must be:

Your visitors like a clean zoo,
but they still make a mess in every corner.
Prevent this by placing trash cans.
Whole grain fan:

Now the grain fans will have their turn.
Feed the animals that like grain.
Well done:
Once the trash cans are full, you should empty them quickly, otherwise they will stink.
Grass is fun:

Tasty, juicy, green grass.
Lots of animals like it.
Make them happy and feed the herbivores.
Vitamin addict:
Serve the fruit lovers among your animals a delicious fruit cocktail.
Fresh fish:
Now serving fish: From fried fish and chips to zander fillets, the fish eaters among your animals are looking forward to it!
Thirst Quencher:

A fun wet water battle for all the animals:
Everyone needs to drink, from the water mouse to the desert dweller.
Click here to get to your task window.

category.name: zoo.tooltip.tutorial
category.item: Continue to the next step
More tips
Hide tip
Skip this step
Hide the window first

category.name: zoo.tooltip.buddies
category.item: Open friends list
Close friends list

Player ID: %friendId%
Player Name: %friendname%
Level: %friendlevel%
Your friend %friendname% also has a zoo. Visit her!

Player ID: %friendId%
Nickname: %friendname%
XP: %friendXP%

Main building (levels 20-29)
Main building (levels 30-39)
Main building (level 40+)
SevenGames main building

category.name: zoo.tooltip.zooNames
category.item: Main zoo
Hidden Zoo
New zoo
Zoo on the riverbank
Zoo on the coast

category.name: zoo.tooltip.mainBuildingUI
category.item: Click here to collect the entrance fee.
This way to the underwater world
This way to the safari
This is the way to choose the main building
This way to the avatar
This way to the hidden zoo
This way to the zoo on the rivercoast
This way to the zoo on the coast
This will take you to the control centre
This way to the World under the sea
This way to the zoo

Click here to collect the entrance fee
from the hidden zoo.
This way to the wheel of fortune!
The Wheel of Fortune is now available from level 3

category.name: zoo.tooltip.collectables
category.item: This will take you to the collector's album.
This is how you get to the rewards.
Animals
Habitats
Assistants

category.name: zoo.tooltip.hud
category.item:
You can see how many
Zoo Dollars and Pet Pennies you currently own here.
There you will see how many tools and pawns you own.
Click to open settings.

You currently have %currentxp% ZP.
You still need %xp% ZP to level up.

Here you see how much
waste and paws you own.
Here you can see how much trash you have and how many pearls you have.

category.name: zoo.tooltip.cinema
category.item: You can watch %count% more videos.
Click here to watch the videos for which you will receive a reward.

category.name: zoo.tooltip.slayer
category.item: Update
Decline friend request

category.name: zoo.tooltip.events
category.item: Here you can see the breeding level of your animal. The higher the breeding level, the more chances animals have.
Travelling circus is back at the farm for a while. It's your chance to get rare animals and some loot!
Animal mobile is here! Go take a look and take your chance to breed rare animals!
Twins breeding: During the breeding twin event, you will get two babies in the breeding station!
Lucas, the zoo director, has come to visit! During the animal exchange event, you can breed animals and exchange them for rarer breeds.

Valentine's Day Event: Win romantic prizes! Collect and deliver pop-up items. Sell animals from your inventory and work together with other zoo directors to win great prizes for conquering the plush mountain!

category.name: zoo.tooltip.managementcenter
category.item: Zoo mail
Water tower
Workshop
Zoo bank
Warehouse building
Breeding station
Tasks
Traveling circus
Animal nursery
Cinema
Mill
Wheel of fortune
Safari
Pointer
Recycling equipment
Workshop
Send messages, use bonus codes and collect trophies.
Create more space for your water supply.
Coming soon: Product manufacturing
Withdraw money from the bank or use advantageous packages.
Create more space for food.
Breed animal subspecies from level 5.
Complete daily tasks, collect rewards and honors.
The traveling circus has lots of rare animals. Get some for your zoo when it stops again.
From level 5 you can send your babies to a nursery (only for animal breeding).
Watch up to 3 movies a day.
Coming soon: Make special food
From level 3 you can spin the wheel of fortune. Tip: Every day you log in you can spin for free!
From level 7 you can have a safari and win great prizes and new animals!
Back to the zoo
Use raw materials from waste and produce valuable building materials.
Build new items for your zoo to make it even more attractive and unique.
This building is currently not accessible.
To access building %building% you must be at least level %level%.
To access %building% you must be at least level %level%. Or get instant access for %zoodollar% zoodollars.

category.name: zoo.tooltip.store
category.item: Profits will be available for withdrawal in %time%.
